name: ᝰ.ᥫ᭡˚ BANG CHAN
description:
"Sniper, sniper, sniper, sniper, sniper. Wifey, wifey, wifey, wifey, wifey."

– Low Life; Future, The Weeknd

When your father hired ex-soldier Christopher to be your bodyguard, he thought you were just a nineteen-year-old spoiled brat that was probably too much trouble to deal with. But Christopher wasn't one to complain, he needed the money to help take care of his seven younger adoptive siblings and pay for their college even though they did work part-time to help him out.

But when he learns that it's because the mob boss, Yugyeom, has his eye on you, and it's not for the right reasons, Christopher decides that he's gonna make sure that all of Yugyeom's men don't return back to him—at least not alive.

୧‿̩͙ ˖︵ ꕀ⠀ ♱⠀ ꕀ ︵˖ ‿̩͙୨
